# Clipboard

A copy-to-clipboard utility component that provides a complete UI for copying text, including a trigger button, status indicator, and optional input field.

## Import

```jsx
import { Clipboard } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Usage Pattern

This component uses a nested property pattern. Access sub-components as properties of the main component:

```jsx
<Clipboard>
  <Clipboard.Label />
  <Clipboard.Control>
    <Clipboard.Input />
    <Clipboard.Trigger />
  </Clipboard.Control>
</Clipboard>
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `Clipboard` | The root component that manages clipboard state. |
| `Clipboard.Trigger` | The button that triggers the copy action. |
| `Clipboard.Indicator` | Visual feedback showing copy success/idle state. |
| `Clipboard.Input` | A read-only input displaying the value to be copied. |
| `Clipboard.Label` | A label for the clipboard component. |
| `Clipboard.Control` | A container wrapping the input and trigger together. |

## Props

### Clipboard

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `value` | `string` | - | The text value to copy to the clipboard. |
| `timeout` | `number` | `2000` | Duration in milliseconds to show the success state after copying. |
| `onStatusChange` | `(details: { copied: boolean }) => void` | - | Callback when the copy status changes. |

## Usage

### Basic Clipboard

```jsx
<Clipboard value="npm install @onlinesales-ai/ui">
  <Clipboard.Label>Install Command</Clipboard.Label>
  <Clipboard.Control>
    <Clipboard.Input />
    <Clipboard.Trigger>
      <Clipboard.Indicator />
    </Clipboard.Trigger>
  </Clipboard.Control>
</Clipboard>
```

### Clipboard Button Only

```jsx
<Clipboard value="https://example.com/share/abc123">
  <Clipboard.Trigger asChild>
    <Button size="sm" variant="outline">
      <Clipboard.Indicator /> Copy Link
    </Button>
  </Clipboard.Trigger>
</Clipboard>
```

### Clipboard with Status Callback

```jsx
<Clipboard
  value={apiKey}
  onStatusChange={({ copied }) => {
    if (copied) console.log("API key copied!");
  }}
>
  <Clipboard.Control>
    <Clipboard.Input />
    <Clipboard.Trigger>
      <Clipboard.Indicator />
    </Clipboard.Trigger>
  </Clipboard.Control>
</Clipboard>
```
